PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-11-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt for and with Michael Chase.

The Court stated that it seemed appropriate to have Mr. Chase appointed as Executor. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to receipt of the written order). Mr. Huysentruyt will submit a revised order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
